channel.title: Journal of Homeland Security and Emergency Management
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Journal of Homeland Security and Emergency Management

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Tara Long, Belinda Corder DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jhsem-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: Safety First or Saving Lives? How Medical Responders Would Decide when Facing an Active Violent Incident. Results from an Explorative Cross-National Survey
item.description: Article by Tara Long, Belinda Corder DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jhsem-2022-0051

item.title: Use of Crisis Communication Strategies by Food Bank Network During a Global Pandemic
item.description: Article by Tara Long, Belinda Corder DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jhsem-2023-0018

item.title: Strategic Planning for Post-Earthquake Health Services Continuity: Leveraging Family Healthcare Centers in Istanbul
item.description: Article by Tara Long, Belinda Corder DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jhsem-2024-0003

item.title: Beyond Chinese Spy Balloons: Why We Need to Teach East Asian Studies in U.S. Homeland Security and Emergency Preparedness Programs
item.description: Article by Tara Long, Belinda Corder DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jhsem-2023-0029

item.title: How a Chemical Weapons Threat Positively Impacted a Hospital’s Emergency Preparedness
item.description: Article by Tara Long, Belinda Corder DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jhsem-2023-0044
